# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the change and the problem it solves.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Chore

## Validation

- [ ] `flutter test`
- [ ] `flutter analyze`
- [ ] Manual validation

## Notes

Add any screenshots, follow-up tasks, or review notes here.
